data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #2' is dependent on the successful execution of related use cases, particularly those that validate explicit needs. However, several of these use cases have failed with HTTP 500 errors, indicating that the system is unable to process requests correctly. This failure prevents the validation of the persona scenario as the expected outcomes cannot be confirmed or reported due to the underlying issues in the system.
gaps: Multiple use cases related to the persona scenario validation have failed, indicating systemic issues.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
